answer: \boxed{Marcus was created as a cyborg by **Cyberdyne Systems**—specifically **Dr. Serena Kogan**—to **lure John Connor into a trap** at Skynet’s San Francisco base. Skynet, having failed to kill John repeatedly, used Marcus as a **decoy and assassin**, exploiting his human-like appearance and resistance to Terminator attacks to ensure John’s death during the Resistance’s offensive. His cyborg nature (mechanical endoskeleton and artificial cortex) made him resilient enough to survive Skynet’s systems while appearing human to manipulate John into walking into the ambush.}
